[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111100 7
1 000111110 5
2 010100000 2
3 101110000 4
4 110010111 6

6 111001011 6
7 111111101 8
